about.story_text: Schlushed has been the premier provider of auto and truck detailing in the Doylestown area since 1999. We use only the best space-age products to ensure your vehicle looks stunning and protected for the long haul. Our commitment is to deliver exceptional results with every service.
about.founder_note: Our continued success comes from our passion for quality and customer satisfaction. We treat every vehicle as if it were our own, ensuring you drive away delighted.

features.title: Advanced Space-Age Products
features.description: We utilize cutting-edge, scientifically formulated detailing products for unmatched shine and protection.

features.title: Expert Detailing Technicians
features.description: Our experienced team knows every detail counts, delivering meticulous care to your vehicle.

features.title: Full-Service Detailing Options
features.description: From basic to super detailing packages tailored to your needs, we provide comprehensive care.

features.title: Trustworthy Local Service
features.description: Serving Doylestown with reliable and friendly service since 1999, we value community relationships.
